message.content:
@startuml
title GameEnginePluginLifecycle

participant "Host Application" as HA #LightBlue2
participant "Host Application Interop" as HAI #LightBlue2
participant "Game Engine Plugin" as GEP #LightBlue2

HA ->> HA : Initialization
activate HA
HAI <-[new] HA 
deactivate HA
create participant HAI 

note over HAI,GEP: Load GE Plugin(s)
GEP <-- HAI : load into memory
activate HAI
activate GEP
HAI --> GEP : GEP_Initialize
return initialization_ok = 0


loop Repeat Every Frame Period
    
    note right of HAI : delays
    activate HAI
    HAI->GEP : GEP_HandleSimulationReponseMessages
    return handled_ok = 0
   
    
   ' alt [if response message had error]\nerror handling\nelse \ndelays\nend 
    
   
     HAI-->GEP : GEP_HandleSimulationControlMessages
     
     
      deactivate HAI
      
      
       loop while not shutdown signal from host application
        
        end 
        
         return handled_ok = 0
    
    
    

@enduml
